tags.note: The arrow is pointing towards the North. Which means you will have to continue walking for 2km to get to the square and museum though the straight distance between them is 700m.

tags.inscription: 天安门国旗护卫队 听党指挥 能打胜仗 作风优良

tags.inscription:1: 北京中轴线 BEIJING CENTRAL AXIS 北京中轴线位于北京老城中心，纵贯老城南北，是统领整个老城规划格局的建筑与遗址的组合体，也是中国现存最为完整的传统都城中轴线建筑群。 Beijing Central Axis is an ensemble of building complexes and archeological sites running north-south through the heart of the old city of Beijing and governing t
tags.inscription:2: he overall layout of the capital. It is also the most complete traditional central axis architectural complex in China's existing capital city. 天安门 TIAN'ANMEN GATE 天安门位于北京中轴线上，端门以南，外金水桥以北，面朝天安门广场。天安门以城楼为主体建筑，城楼北侧设一对华表，城楼南侧设石狮两对、华表一对，均以中轴线东西对称分布。天安门是明清时期颁布
tags.inscription:3: 诏令及现代举行重大国事活动的场所，至今仍承担着重要的礼仪功能。1949年10月1日，中华人共和国开国大典在天安门举行，见证了中华人民共和国的建立。 The Tian'anmen Gate sits on Beijing Central Axis, south of the Upright Gate and north of the Outer Jinshui Bridges, facing Tian'anmen Square. The gate tower is the main structure of
tags.inscription:4: the gate, with a pair of ceremonial columns known in Chinese as huabiao on its north side. There is another pair of huabiao, joined by two pairs of stone lions, on the south side, all standing and sitting west-east of central axis symmetrically. The Tian'
tags.inscription:5: anmen Gate was where the emperors of the Ming and Qing dynasties issued their imperial edicts. It remains as a venue for major national celebrations. The founding ceremony of the People's Republic of China (PRC) was held here on October 1st, 1949, proclai
tags.inscription:6: ming the birth of the PRC.
tags.note: Map of 北京中轴线 is on the left part of the board; map of 天安门 is on the right side of the board. The description of each area is above the maps.

tags.description: 天安门广场是位于中华人民共和国北京市中心的城市广场，是世界上最大的城市广场之一。因位于明清北京皇城的南门“天安门”外而得名。广场位于北京中轴线上，南北长880米东西宽500米，面积44万平方米。广场北端设有国旗杆，每天都会随日出、日落进行升旗、降旗仪式。
